title: Business Valuation Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor
description: IBBI registered valuer in Mumbai. Business valuation for M&A, share transfers, FEMA, SEBI, income tax. Expert CA. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for business valuation services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides IBBI-compliant business valuations in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) and IBBI Registered Valuer (Reg. No. IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333). Our valuation reports are accepted by ROC, NCLT, Income Tax, RBI, and SEBI.

What is Business Valuation Services Mumbai | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  IBBI-compliant valuation report meeting Companies Act Section 247, FEMA, SEBI, and Income Tax requirements. Multiple valuation methodologies — DCF, comparable company analysis, precedent transactions, NAV, and excess earnings method. Fair Market Value certification for share transfers, M&A transactions, and NCLT schemes. Valuation for FEMA compliance — share pricing for foreign investment (FC-GPR), transfer pricing, and exit valuations. Valuation certificate for bank loan assessment and collateral evaluation. Expert witness testimony for valuation disputes in NCLT and arbitration proceedings.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Business Valuation in Mumbai
  Mumbai's M&A market, capital markets, and foreign investment activity create diverse valuation needs — from startup fundraising to listed company demergers. CA V. Viswanathan (IBBI Registered Valuer) delivers valuations that meet the specific regulatory standard for each purpose: Rule 11UA for income tax, FEMA pricing guidelines for RBI filings, ICAI Valuation Standards for statutory requirements, and IVS for international transactions. Our Goregaon West office is accessible for in-person engagement reviews. We handle valuations across industries — financial services, manufacturing, real estate, technology, and healthcare — with sector-specific valuation expertise.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Purpose and scope definition — regulatory standard, timeline, deliverable format. Step 2: Data collection — 3-5 years of financials, management projections, industry benchmarks. Step 3: Multi-method valuation analysis. Step 4: Draft report for management review and discussion. Step 5: Final IBBI-compliant valuation report with registered valuer certificate. Step 6: Filing support with ROC, Income Tax, RBI, or NCLT as applicable. Step 7: Defence of valuation during regulatory scrutiny or disputes.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need a business valuation in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062

faqs.q: Is IBBI registration mandatory for business valuation?
faqs.a: IBBI registration is mandatory for valuations under Companies Act Section 247 (share allotment, buyback, merger schemes) and IBC (CIRP, liquidation). For income tax and FEMA valuations, a CA or merchant banker can provide valuation, but IBBI-registered valuer reports carry higher credibility.

faqs.q: How much does a business valuation cost in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Fees depend on company size, complexity, purpose, and number of methods required. We provide a fixed-fee quote after understanding the engagement scope. Contact +91-77000 89597 for a no-obligation discussion.

faqs.q: Can you value a company for FEMA share pricing?
faqs.a: Yes. We regularly provide FEMA-compliant valuations for share issuance to foreign investors (FC-GPR), share transfers between residents and non-residents (FC-TRS), and exit pricing under FEMA regulations. Our valuations comply with RBI pricing guidelines.
